channel.title: Journal of Polymer Engineering
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Journal of Polymer Engineering

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Chihan Meng, Feng Zhang, Jiachun Zhong, Zejun Pu, Wenhui Wu, Yuhao Yang DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/polyeng-2025-frontmatter2

item.title: Synthesis and characterization of ASU-PPO based anion exchange membrane with PEG support for water electrolysis
item.description: Article by Chihan Meng, Feng Zhang, Jiachun Zhong, Zejun Pu, Wenhui Wu, Yuhao Yang DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/polyeng-2024-0159

item.title: Experimental and numerical investigations on the mechanical properties of overmolded hybrid fiber reinforced thermoplastic composites
item.description: Article by Chihan Meng, Feng Zhang, Jiachun Zhong, Zejun Pu, Wenhui Wu, Yuhao Yang DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/polyeng-2024-0064

item.title: Reed fiber as a sustainable filler for tuning the biodegradability of polylactic acid composites
item.description: Article by Chihan Meng, Feng Zhang, Jiachun Zhong, Zejun Pu, Wenhui Wu, Yuhao Yang DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/polyeng-2024-0029

item.title: Preparation of liquid metal/thermoplastic polyurethane composites with enhanced thermal conductivity via rolling regulation
item.description: Article by Chihan Meng, Feng Zhang, Jiachun Zhong, Zejun Pu, Wenhui Wu, Yuhao Yang DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/polyeng-2024-0133

item.title: Lignin charcoal/preparation of chitosan composite membrane and H2S adsorption properties
item.description: Article by Chihan Meng, Feng Zhang, Jiachun Zhong, Zejun Pu, Wenhui Wu, Yuhao Yang DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/polyeng-2024-0151

item.title: Synthesis and formulation of modified milk protein and its study as an adhesive for wood binding
item.description: Article by Chihan Meng, Feng Zhang, Jiachun Zhong, Zejun Pu, Wenhui Wu, Yuhao Yang DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/polyeng-2024-0167

item.title: Preparation and properties of PLCL/OM-Laponite materials with potential applications in orthopedic bandage
item.description: Article by Chihan Meng, Feng Zhang, Jiachun Zhong, Zejun Pu, Wenhui Wu, Yuhao Yang DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/polyeng-2024-0099

item.title: Probability evaluation of the ternary polymerization and reactivity ratio of bio-based PA5T/56
item.description: Article by Chihan Meng, Feng Zhang, Jiachun Zhong, Zejun Pu, Wenhui Wu, Yuhao Yang DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/polyeng-2024-0199
